202.reason: Potential StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if '&' is last character on line

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential StringIndexOutOfBoundsException if '&' is last character on line
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Missing bounds check for columnNumber + 1 < line.length(), causing StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when '&' appears at the end of a line

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds when '&' is at the end of line; should check columnNumber + 1 < line.length() first]
